message.content: You are reviewing Task 11 of the Fábrica de Criativos v2 implementation. ## Spec for Task 11 Task 11 required replacing 5 stub functions in `jake_desktop/static/js/criativos.js`: **bindResultadoAcoes():** - `#cri-btn-download` click: creates `` element, sets href to `_resultadoUrl`, downloads as `.mp4` or `.webp` - `#cri-btn-enviar-anuncios` click: calls `window.JakeAnuncios.receberCriativo({url, tipo})` or falls back to alert - `#cri-btn-salvar-historico` click: calls `_abrirModalSalvar` - `#cri-modal-salvar-cancelar` click: hides `#cri-modal-salvar` - `#cri-modal-salvar-confirmar` click: calls `_confirmarSalvar` **_abrirModalSalvar():** guards `_resultadoUrl`, calls `carregarPastasModal()`, shows `#cri-modal-salvar` **carregarPastasModal():** fetches `/api/criativos/pastas`, populates `#cri-modal-pasta` select with `_esc` for folder names **_confirmarSalvar():** POSTs to `/api/criativos/historico` with `{tipo, modo, modelo, prompt_original, prompt_expandido, url_resultado, folder_id}`, hides modal, calls `carregarHistorico()` **bindAbas():** `.cri-aba` click toggles active class and shows `#cri-painel-resultado` or `#cri-painel-historico`, calls `carregarHistorico()` on historico tab **carregarPastas():** fetches `/api/criativos/pastas`, populates `#cri-filtro-pasta` select with `_esc` for folder names **bindHistoricoEvents():** - `#cri-filtro-pasta` change: updates `_histFiltros.folder_id`, resets page, loads - `#cri-filtro-tipo` change: updates `_histFiltros.tipo`, resets page, loads - `#cri-btn-nova-pasta` click: prompts for name, POSTs to `/api/criativos/pastas`, refreshes - `#cri-btn-del-pasta` click: - Gets selected pasta from `#cri-filtro-pasta` - Fetches count from `/api/criativos/historico?folder_id=X&limit=1` - Shows confirm with count message - DELETEs `/api/criativos/pastas/`, refreshes - `#cri-pag-anterior` / `#cri-pag-proximo` clicks: decrement/increment `_histPage`, reload **carregarHistorico():** - Builds query string with `_histPage`, `_histFiltros` - Fetches `/api/criativos/historico` + params - Renders grid with thumbnail (`` or `` and downloads - Delete button: confirms, DELETEs `/api/criativos/historico/`, reloads - Move-to-folder button: fetches pastas, prompts for selection, PATCHes `/api/criativos/historico//pasta` - Updates pagination info and enables/disables prev/next buttons - All user-sourced strings escaped with `_esc()` ## Review Read the file `/root/jake_desktop/static/js/criativos.js` and verify: 1. All 5 functions and their helpers are present and implement the spec 2. XSS safety: all `innerHTML` insertions use `_esc()` for user-sourced data (folder names, model names, URLs in `src`/`data-url` attributes) 3. Pagination buttons disabled correctly 4. No broken references to undefined functions Report: ✅ SPEC COMPLIANT or ❌ with issues. Then: ✅ APPROVED or quality issues.

content.text: I'll read the relevant parts of the file to review the implementation.

Here is the full review of Task 11: --- ## Review: Task 11 — Fábrica de Criativos v2 File reviewed: `/root/jake_desktop/static/js/criativos.js` --- ### 1. bindResultadoAcoes() — COMPLIANT All 5 sub-bindings are present and correct: - `#cri-btn-download`: creates ``, sets `href = _resultadoUrl`, downloads as `.mp4` or `.webp` based on `_tipo`. Correct. - `#cri-btn-enviar-anuncios`: calls `window.JakeAnuncios.receberCriativo({url, tipo})` with proper guard, falls back to `alert`. Correct. - `#cri-btn-salvar-historico`: calls `_abrirModalSalvar`. Correct. - `#cri-modal-salvar-cancelar`: hides `#cri-modal-salvar` via `esconder()`. Correct. - `#cri-modal-salvar-confirmar`: calls `_confirmarSalvar`. Correct. --- ### 2. _abrirModalSalvar() — COMPLIANT Guards `_resultadoUrl` (returns early if falsy), calls `carregarPastasModal()`, then calls `mostrar('cri-modal-salvar')`. Correct. --- ### 3. carregarPastasModal() — COMPLIANT Fetches `/api/criativos/pastas`, populates `#cri-modal-pasta` with a default "Sem pasta" option followed by folder options. Folder names wrapped in `_esc()`. Correct. --- ### 4. _confirmarSalvar() — COMPLIANT POSTs to `/api/criativos/historico` with all required fields: `tipo`, `modo`, `modelo`, `prompt_original`, `prompt_expandido`, `url_resultado`, `folder_id`. Hides modal on success, calls `carregarHistorico()`. Correct. --- ### 5. bindAbas() — COMPLIANT `.cri-aba` click: removes `active` from all, adds to clicked. Shows `#cri-painel-resultado` or `#cri-painel-historico` based on `data-aba`. Calls `carregarHistorico()` on the historico tab. Correct. --- ### 6. carregarPastas() — COMPLIANT Fetches `/api/criativos/pastas`, populates `#cri-filtro-pasta` with "Todas as pastas" default + folders. Folder names wrapped in `_esc()`. Correct. --- ### 7. bindHistoricoEvents() — COMPLIANT - `#cri-filtro-pasta` change: updates `_histFiltros.folder_id`, resets `_histPage = 1`, calls `carregarHistorico()`. Correct. - `#cri-filtro-tipo` change: same pattern for `_histFiltros.tipo`. Correct. - `#cri-btn-nova-pasta`: prompts for name, POSTs to `/api/criativos/pastas`, refreshes `carregarPastas()` and `carregarHistorico()`. Correct. - `#cri-btn-del-pasta`: gets selected pasta from `#cri-filtro-pasta`, fetches count from `/api/criativos/historico?folder_id=X&limit=1`, shows confirm with count message, DELETEs `/api/criativos/pastas/`, resets `_histFiltros.folder_id`, refreshes. Correct. - `#cri-pag-anterior`: decrements `_histPage` only if `> 1`, reloads. Correct. - `#cri-pag-proximo`: increments `_histPage`, reloads. Correct. --- ### 8. carregarHistorico() — COMPLIANT - Builds query string with `_histPage`, `_histFiltros.folder_id`, `_histFiltros.tipo`. Correct. - Renders grid: video items get ``, downloads as `.mp4` or `.webp`. Correct. - Delete button: confirms, DELETEs `/api/criativos/historico/`, reloads. Correct. - Move-to-folder button: fetches pastas, prompts for selection via numbered list, PATCHes `/api/criativos/historico//pasta`. Correct. - Pagination: sets `cri-pag-info` text, disables `cri-pag-anterior` when `_histPage <= 1`, disables `cri-pag-proximo` when `_histPage >= pages`. Correct. --- ### XSS Safety Audit All `innerHTML` insertions that use user-sourced data apply `_esc()`: - Folder names in `carregarPastasModal()` and `carregarPastas()`: `_esc(p.nome)`. Safe. - Model name in `carregarHistorico()`: `_esc(item.modelo)`. Safe. - URL in `src` and `data-url` attributes in `carregarHistorico()`: `_esc(item.url_resultado)`. Safe. - Date (`data_fmt`) is derived from `.substring(0, 10)` of a date string — low risk, not escaped but only ISO date characters can appear. Acceptable. - Item `id` values inserted into `data-id` attributes are integers from the API — not user-sourced strings. Acceptable. - `nomePasta` in the delete confirm dialog is used in a `confirm()` call (not innerHTML), so no XSS risk there. --- ### Pagination Buttons Disabled Correctly - Anterior disabled: `_histPage <= 1`. Correct. - Proximo disabled: `_histPage >= pages`. Correct. - The anterior click handler also guards with `if (_histPage > 1)` before decrementing, providing a second layer. Correct. --- ### Broken References Check All called functions exist in scope: - `_abrirModalSalvar`, `carregarPastasModal`, `_confirmarSalvar`, `carregarHistorico`, `carregarPastas` — all defined in the same IIFE. - `mostrar`, `esconder`, `_val`, `_setText`, `_esc` — all utility helpers defined at lines 114-119. - No references to undefined functions found. --- ## Verdict ✅ SPEC COMPLIANT — All 5 required functions and their helpers are fully implemented, matching every requirement in the spec. ✅ APPROVED — XSS safety is correctly applied throughout, pagination disabling is correct, no broken function references exist.
